adventures.title: From hell to paradise
adventures.desc: The experience begins by leaving the bustle of the city, where noise, traffic, and hurry set the daily pace—a kind of modern hell. Gradually, the path makes its way toward the Viñales Valley, where the silence, the intense green, and the clean air transform the environment into an authentic paradise. On foot, you travel along trails that lead to a viewpoint overlooking Viñales and Palmarito. Along the way, you visit the Los Acuáticos community, where residents share their traditions and way of life. The day concludes with a return by horse-drawn carriage, closing a journey that goes, literally, from urban chaos to the peace of the valley.

imgs.alt: Traditional farmer's hut with a thatched roof in a lush green valley in Viñales.
Panoramic view of tropical vegetation and the mountains of the Viñales Valley under a cloudy sky.

adventures.title: Amazing sunrise
adventures.desc: Wake up early to experience an unforgettable sunrise in the Viñales Valley, ascending to the summit of the National Park to admire the rising sun over the mogotes and the rich Cuban biodiversity. Along the way, you will have the opportunity to visit the unique Los Acuáticos community, known for its traditional beliefs linked to the healing power of water and its way of life in harmony with nature. Enjoy an artisanal coffee with locals before descending to the Prehistory Mural, where this unique experience in contact with the natural environment will end.

imgs.alt: Silhouette of a traditional Cuban hat in front of the sunrise in the mountains of Viñales.
Golden sunrise over the sea of clouds and the mogotes of the Viñales Valley, Cuba.
Tourists enjoying the sunrise view from a traditional wooden porch in Viñales.

adventures.title: Enjoying the sunset
adventures.desc: Enjoy the Valley of Silence, discover the tobacco process from planting to the making of criollo cigars. Finalize the experience relaxing in a farmer's house, enjoying a Criollo Mojito and a natural cigar while contemplating the sunset.

imgs.alt: Warm afternoon light illuminating the tobacco fields and mogotes of the Viñales Valley.
Local farmer expertly rolling a traditional Cuban cigar by hand in a drying house.
Close-up of a hand holding a natural cigar with the Viñales mountains in the background.

adventures.title: A true hiking
adventures.desc: Discover Viñales on an ideal tour for outdoor exercise lovers, ascending through an ancient gallery forest and descending toward the Palmarito Valley. Enjoy breathtaking views, interact with local residents, and learn about tobacco cultivation.

imgs.alt: Hikers carefully crossing a small river using a fallen log as a bridge near a waterfall in the Viñales forest.

adventures.title: Antiquity and nature
adventures.desc: Explore the ancient river canyon of the Viñales Valley on a three-hour hike, a refuge for biodiversity and ecological agriculture. Observe endemic birds such as the tocororo and the green woodpecker while enjoying breathtaking views of mountains and fields. A unique experience for nature and adventure lovers.

imgs.alt: View from the inside of a cave in an ancient river canyon toward the lush vegetation of the Viñales Valley.

adventures.title: 100% ecology
adventures.desc: Enjoy an exclusive tour of a private farm dedicated to ecological agriculture, where you will taste natural fruits and juices while learning about local traditions and crops. Local residents will share details about the farm's sustainable practices, and the visit will culminate with a tour to the Cow Cave (Cueva de la Vaca), offering stunning views of the natural environment.

imgs.alt: Red dirt path with a wooden sign pointing the way to the Cow Cave (Cueva de la Vaca).
Rows of crops in an ecological agriculture farm with the Viñales mountains in the background.
Local farmers harvesting fresh leaves in a tobacco plantation during an ecological tour.

adventures.title: Tobacco inside
adventures.desc: Discover the tradition of tobacco cultivation with the "TABACO IN SIDE" experience, exploring its aboriginal roots and its peasant legacy. During the growing season (November to March), you will tour plantations, participate in the stripping process (despalillo), and learn the artisanal making of criollo cigars from local guides. An authentic experience that will connect you with the history and culture of tobacco in Cuba.

imgs.alt: Close-up of a farmer's hands rolling a traditional Cuban cigar on a rustic wooden table.
Cuban farmer with a traditional hat and cigar working in a tobacco plantation with the mogotes in the background.
Rows of green tobacco leaves hanging to dry inside a traditional tobacco house.

adventures.title: Viñales: day trip
adventures.desc: Make the most of your visit to Viñales with our day trip, an all-inclusive package that combines nature and culture. Travel by American car through the San Vicente Valley, visit the Indian Cave and the Palenque de los Cimarrones, enjoy views from Los Jazmines, and explore the Prehistory Mural. Then, walk through La Penitencia Valley, see the tobacco plantations, and return in a horse-drawn carriage. The experience includes lunch at Los Reyes and a horseback ride through the Palmarito Valley, with alternative options like cycling or visiting the Cow Cave.

imgs.alt: A classic blue American car driving along a reddish dirt road with the mogotes and vegetation of Viñales in the background.

adventures.title: History, culture, and nature
adventures.desc: Discover the history, culture, and nature of Viñales on a comprehensive tour that includes the Indian Cave, the Palenque de los Cimarrones, and the tobacco stripping, where you will learn about the making of the Cuban cigar. Admire the Prehistory Mural, enjoy panoramic views from the Palmarito and La Penitencia valleys, and from the terrace of Hotel Los Jazmines. The experience is completed with a visit to a tobacco farmer and a tour through the historic center of Viñales.

imgs.alt: Great Prehistory Mural painted on a mogote, representing historical evolution in the Viñales Valley.
